# taipan_agent_passport (Resource)

Renders and validates a TAIPANBOX Agent Passport document (schema taipanbox.dev/agent-passport/v0.1). This resource calls no API: a passport is a small, static JSON file describing one agent's identity, owner, runtime and attestation posture, consumed by Idryx and Qryx, not a server-managed object. Create and Update compute and validate the document, reusing agent-stack-go/passport's Parse verbatim (the same validation Idryx runs on ingest), and, if output_path is set, write it to disk at file mode 0600. Delete removes that file, if any. The rendered document is exposed as the computed json attribute for downstream use, e.g. handing it to another resource or provisioner.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The passport's agent:// URI, e.g. agent://acme-bank.example/support/tier1-bot. Validated with agent-stack-go/passport.ValidateAgentURI. Changing it forces a new resource.
- `owner` (String) The owning team or identity, e.g. team-support@acme-bank.example.

### Optional

- `attestation_detail` (String) A method-specific reference for attestation_method, e.g. a SPIFFE ID for spiffe-svid or an issuer URL for oidc (agent-passport/SPEC.md §4.3; unconstrained string, no format is validated). Ignored if attestation_method is unset, since the rendered document then omits the attestation block entirely.
- `attestation_method` (String) How the organization binds this passport's id to a workload: one of none, oidc, spiffe-svid, enclave-key, mtls-cert. Left unset, the rendered document omits the attestation block entirely.
- `display_name` (String) Human-readable name for the agent.
- `filesystem` (Block List) Folders this agent is declared to access, each a nested filesystem { path mode } block, rendered as the document's root-level filesystem array (agent-passport/SPEC.md §4.4). A declaration carried on the passport for audit and inventory, not a control this stack enforces at runtime. Omitted from the rendered document entirely when no blocks are set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--filesystem))
- `labels` (Map of String) Free-form string labels, e.g. env, cost_center.
- `models` (Block List) LLM providers, models and endpoints this agent is declared to use, each a nested models { provider model endpoint } block, rendered as the document's root-level models array (agent-passport/SPEC.md §4.5). A declaration for audit and inventory, not a control this stack enforces at runtime. Omitted from the rendered document entirely when no blocks are set. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--models))
- `output_path` (String) If set, the rendered passport JSON is written to this file path (mode 0600) so Idryx/Qryx can read it from disk. If unset, the resource only computes the json attribute and manages no file.
- `parent` (String) The agent:// URI of this agent's static provisioning parent, if any.
- `runtime` (String) The agent's runtime, e.g. langgraph, autogen, custom.

### Read-Only

- `json` (String) The rendered, schema-validated passport document (taipanbox.dev/agent-passport/v0.1), with stable key order for a reproducible diff.

<a id="nestedblock--filesystem"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filesystem`

Required:

- `mode` (String) Access mode for this folder: read or write (agent-passport/SPEC.md §4.4).
- `path` (String) Folder path the agent is declared to access, e.g. /data/reports.


<a id="nestedblock--models"></a>
### Nested Schema for `models`

Required:

- `provider` (String) LLM provider label, e.g. anthropic, openai, bedrock, google, mistral, cohere.

Optional:

- `endpoint` (String) API endpoint host this agent is declared to reach, e.g. api.anthropic.com. Omitted from the rendered document when unset.
- `model` (String) Specific model this agent uses, when pinned, e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5 or gpt-4o. Omitted from the rendered document when unset.
